title: malva olbia
intro: Malva olbia, also known as mallow, is a plant species in the genus Malva and is characterized by its rounded leaves and small, pale flowers. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in soothing digestive issues and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Malva olbia include its ability to calm digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate skin irritations. Malva olbia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or used as a topical application to reap its medicinal benefits.
